about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Welcome
about.intro: I am a Software Engineer and Mobile Developer with over five years of experience, specializing in the development of native Android and hybrid Flutter applications. As a technical lead, I focus on spearheading architectural reengineering initiatives, establishing clean architectural standards, and implementing automated processes to optimize the development lifecycle. My expertise spans project management, data science, and blockchain technology.

mobileAndroid.title: Native Android Development
mobileAndroid.description: Expert development of high-performance Android applications with modern architectural patterns

flutter.title: Flutter Cross-Platform Apps
flutter.description: Create beautiful, fast iOS and Android apps from a single codebase with Flutter

webApps.title: Web Application Development
webApps.description: Build responsive and dynamic web applications with modern frameworks and technologies

architecture.title: Clean Architecture & Design
architecture.description: Establish scalable architectural standards and best practices for enterprise projects

cicd.title: CI/CD Pipeline Implementation
cicd.description: Automate your development lifecycle with modern CI/CD tools and practices

consulting.title: Technical Consulting
consulting.description: Expert guidance on technology strategy, architecture, and digital transformation

highlights: Head of the Flutter team overseeing end-to-end development of web and mobile applications
Delivered over 40 enterprise-grade projects for clients like Rentandes and Finandina
Spearheaded mobile development lifecycle reengineering with Clean Architecture and CI/CD automation
Collaborated with stakeholders to transform business requirements into intuitive digital features
Independently developed and published proprietary mobile applications on Google Play Store
Created three successful mobile apps with over 5,000 combined downloads
Collaborated with UTPL Software Research Group on data collection applications
Drove digital transformation initiatives for multiple businesses
Developed and maintained core software solutions for the university
Led end-to-end development of globally utilized Tuition Quotation Mobile App
Optimized application performance for lower-end devices
Debugged and resolved complex compatibility issues across Android versions

master.degree: Master of Engineering in Software Engineering

bachelor.degree: Bachelor of Science in Systems Engineering and Computing
